chapter_title: Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
text: In this subchapter, “district” means the Victoria County Navigation District.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 623. Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
##### § 623.231 — Definition

In this subchapter, “district” means the Victoria County Navigation District.

*Added by Acts 2003, 78th Leg., ch. 786, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 2003.*

subsections.text: In this subchapter, “district” means the Victoria County Navigation District.

history.raw: Added by Acts 2003, 78th Leg., ch. 786, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 2003.
